title: Aesthetic Shelving
description: Add beautiful, functional wooden shelves to Minecraft! Display items, decorate interiors, and organize your space with style using Aesthetic Shelving.
body:
Aesthetic Shelving brings style and practicality to your Minecraft interiors with a collection of decorative, functional wooden shelves. Whether you're decorating a cozy cottage, a wizard's study, or a bustling workshop, this mod lets you show off your favorite items while keeping everything organized.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddda3d2051502aefda96e33f49de6adcd2140b30.png)

## Functional Display Shelves
Each shelf block can store and display items directly in the world. Perfect for showcasing tools, potions, books, or rare treasures.

## Crafted From All Vanilla Woods (and from my other mods: Arboreal Nature, Wild Fields)
Available in every vanilla wood type — oak, birch, spruce, jungle, acacia, dark oak, mangrove, cherry, bamboo — to match any interior.

## Custom Models & Variants
Includes single and double shelves, wall-mounted and standing options, with visually distinct models for immersive detailing.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a0e139d501f0379f4b38e0ffc2c08665a1e123d_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/578ab025d3bc7c9648e3ff79e94dd75ac4d2f506.png)

## Survival-Friendly Crafting Recipes
Shelves are crafted using simple, logical recipes and can be accessed early in the game — making them useful from the start.

## Smooth Integration With Other Decor Mods
Designed to work beautifully alongside your favorite decoration or storage mods. Lightweight and modpack-friendly.
